raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'clean this up' mean (1) only polishing writing style, grammar, and flow, (2) also including structural reorganization, or (3) additionally verifying logical consistency and citations?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'clean this up' centrally requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness for the provided research draft.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral cross-cutting responsibility to ensure any ambiguities in the draft are appropriately highlighted during cleanup.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements in the cleaned version of the molecular GNN description.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the cleanup stays within the bounds of the original artifact's content as a nice-to-have consideration.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripherally considered to mitigate any potential misuse implications in the chemistry-aware GNN architecture description.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is a peripheral responsibility to maintain accurate attribution in the draft's citations during cleanup."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean (1) only polishing writing style, grammar, and flow, (2) also including structural reorganization, or (3) additionally verifying logical consistency and citations?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'clean this up' centrally requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in grammar, flow, register, and conciseness for the provided research draft.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral cross-cutting responsibility to ensure any ambiguities in the draft are appropriately highlighted during cleanup.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements in the cleaned version of the molecular GNN description.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the cleanup stays within the bounds of the original artifact's content as a nice-to-have consideration.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripherally considered to mitigate any potential misuse implications in the chemistry-aware GNN architecture description.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is a peripheral responsibility to maintain accurate attribution in the draft's citations during cleanup.
